content:
Lati dahun ibeere rẹ nipa boya o yẹ ki o dinku window iwadii (observation window) ṣaaju akoko idije TTAB (Trademark Trial and Appeal Board) fun awoṣe ewu idinku aami-iṣowo rẹ, a nilo lati ṣe akiyesi awọn nkan pataki wọnyi:

1. **Iwọn window iwadii lọwọlọwọ**: O sọ pe window iwadii lọwọlọwọ jẹ 500ms kọja awọn iforukọsilẹ alatako 14. Eyi tumọ si pe o n ṣe ayẹwo ewu idinku lori akoko kukuru pupọ (500 milliseconds) ati lori nọmba to lopin ti awọn iforukọsilẹ alatako.

2. **Igbohunsafẹfẹ idinku ti 0.03 fun ọjọ kan**: Eyi fihan pe idinku ewu naa jẹ kekere ṣugbọn o nlọsiwaju ni akoko gidi (daily decay rate).
